environment_prompt: A neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. Holographic advertisements floating above wet pavement with colorful reflections. Steam rising from grates. Towering skyscrapers with LED panels lining both sides. A ramen stall with red lanterns on the right side. Behind the viewer, more neon-lit storefronts and a flickering vending machine line the street. Narrow side alleys branch off between buildings, dimly lit with distant neon glow.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, eye-level walking view through the street, looking forward along the neon-lit avenue.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a hacker in a glowing cyan jacket with a visible cybernetic left arm and short white hair from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
